title: Add dish search for map discovery
description: Add MVP dish search so users can filter map discovery results by dish name using existing PostgreSQL search capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: Backend map venues endpoint accepts a dish query parameter
Dish filtering uses existing PostgreSQL-backed search patterns for MVP
Frontend map page includes a dish search input
Search state is reflected in map result loading and empty states
No delivery, cart, order, payment, or booking logic is added
Relevant tests are added or updated when possible
